Begin Object Class=MaterialInstanceConstant Name="MI_Legacy_Body"
   Parent = MaterialInstanceConstant'MI_Factory2D_01'
   TwoSided = true
   bIsMasked = false
   BlendMode = BLEND_Opaque

   TextureParameterValues[0] =
   {
      ParameterInfo = { Name=BaseColor }
      ParameterValue = Texture2D'/Game/Legacy/T_Legacy_Body_C.T_Legacy_Body_C'
   }
   TextureParameterValues[1] =
   {
      ParameterInfo = { Name=Normal }
      ParameterValue = Texture2D'/Game/Legacy/T_Legacy_Body_N.T_Legacy_Body_N'
   }
   TextureParameterValues[2] =
   {
      ParameterInfo = { Name=BaseColor }
      ParameterValue = Texture2D'/Game/Legacy/T_Legacy_Body_C.T_Legacy_Body_C'
   }

   VectorParameterValues[0] =
   {
      ParameterInfo = { Name=RColorTint }
      ParameterValue = { R=0.646, G=0.433, B=0.168, A=1 }
   }

   ScalarParameterValues[0] =
   {
      ParameterInfo = { Name=RoughnessAdjust }
      ParameterValue = 0.42
   }
End Object
